parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor interacting with a smartphone app. The lighting, movements, and environment appear natural and consistent with human-recorded footage.

characters.appearance: Young woman with long blonde hair, fair complexion, and dark eye makeup. She has a slender build.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey t-shirt with a graphic print featuring a skeleton and red text. She wears a white smartwatch on her left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Focused and engaged, occasionally smiling or looking thoughtful as she interacts with the app.

characters.appearance: Animated female character with red hair and a friendly expression.
characters.wardrobe: Not fully visible, but appears to be wearing a light-colored top.

scenes.setting: A dimly lit room with purple ambient lighting. A desk with a diamond painting kit and a smartphone.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with long blonde hair sits at a desk, working on a diamond painting project. She holds a pink stylus in her right hand and picks up small beads from a white tray. Her left hand rests near the tray. A smartphone is placed on the desk to her right, displaying an animated character. The room is illuminated with purple light, and a gaming chair is partially visible behind her.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a young woman engaged in a craft activity while simultaneously using a language learning app on her phone. The app displays an animated tutor and text overlays with Japanese phrases and their English translations. The woman interacts with the app, speaking and listening to the tutor. The lighting is moody and purple-toned.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: にほんごきらい。 [I hate Japanese.]
Character B says: おなまえはなんですか？ [What's your name?]
Character A says: わたしのなまえはネスリーです。 [My name is Nesly.]
Character B says: おげんきですか？ [How are you?]
Character A says: はい、げんきです。 [Yes, I'm fine.]
Character B says: にほんごをはなせますか？ [Do you speak Japanese?]
Character A says: はい、わたし... [Yes, I...]
Character B says: はい、はなせます。 [Yes, I speak it.]
Character A says: はい、はなせます。 [Yes, I speak it.]
Character B says: なんさいですか？ [How old are you?]
Character A says: わたし... にじゅうよん...？ [I... twenty-four...?]
Character B says: にじゅうよんさいです。 [I am 24.]
Character A says: にじゅうよんさいです。 [I am 24.]
Character B says: どういたしまして。 [You're welcome]
Character A says: How can I practice my Japanese every day?
Character B says: Just download Praktika.
Character A says: I'll download Praktika right now.
